overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an ancient Greek village in Assassin's Creed Odyssey. The player character walks through a tannery, bustling market square, and quiet pottery courtyard during golden hour, passing NPC workers and various historical structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient tannery with stone pits and leather hides

events.description: approaching the worker stirring the tanning pit with a long pole

agents.ego_description: walking through the tannery examining the leather hides and stone pits

notable_agents.action: worker stirring the tanning pit with a long wooden pole

entered.detail: large animal hides stretched and drying on the white stone wall
rectangular stone basin filled with tanning liquid
rough timber framework supporting the roof structure
large clay storage vessel near the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an ancient tannery with large leather hides hanging on stone walls. A worker stirs one of the stone tanning pits as the camera approaches, passing large terracotta jars and wooden scaffolding.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with canvas stalls and wooden walkways

events.description: exiting the tannery into the open market area with wooden walkways
entering busier area with multiple NPC pedestrians and market activity

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area passing yellow canvas tents and wooden stalls

notable_agents.action: woman in orange dress walking along the path
man standing near the wooden structure observing the market

entered.detail: large yellow fabric canopy with decorative fringe providing shade
elevated wooden plank pathway through the market
pile of large elephant tusks and bones displayed for sale
weathered stone building with wooden balcony and shutters

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tannery, the scene opens into a market street with yellow canvas tents and wooden walkways. The character passes by a display of ivory tusks and navigates through scattered pedestrians, including a woman in an orange dress and a man observing the market.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with forge and merchant stalls

events.description: turning toward the setting sun creating strong backlight and lens flare
passing the active forge with visible flames and smoke

agents.ego_description: walking through the village square toward the sun, passing the forge and various merchants

notable_agents.action: man in blue tunic walking ahead of the player character
merchant sitting on stool near the blue tent

entered.detail: active blacksmith forge with visible flames and smoke
blue fabric merchant tent with wooden poles
tall stone perimeter wall with cypress trees behind
wooden wagon with large wheels parked on the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide village square with cobblestone ground, passing an active forge with visible flames. The camera turns toward the bright setting sun, creating a lens flare effect, and approaches a blue merchant tent near a stone wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: pottery courtyard with kiln and drying wares

events.description: entering the quieter residential courtyard with pottery workshop
approaching the pottery kiln with smoke rising from the chimney

agents.ego_description: exploring the courtyard and examining the pottery kiln and drying clay plates

notable_agents.action: worker carrying pottery near the white kiln

entered.detail: white domed kiln with smoke rising from the top
rows of unfired clay plates drying on wooden planks
cluster of large clay amphorae and storage jars
wooden lean-to structure with canvas roof

segments.scene_description: Entering a quieter residential courtyard, the character discovers a pottery workshop with a smoking white kiln and rows of drying clay plates. A worker carries pottery near the kiln as the camera explores the area with terracotta jars and wooden shelters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the industrial grit of a tannery into the bustling heart of a Greek village, eventually settling in a quiet pottery courtyard. It begins among hanging leather hides and stone tanning pits where a worker stirs a vat, moving past terracotta jars and wooden scaffolding. As the camera exits the tannery, the scene opens into a vibrant market street filled with yellow canvas tents, ivory tusks, and pedestrians navigating wooden walkways. The movement then expands into a wide cobblestone square, passing the flames of an active forge before turning toward the bright setting sun to create a lens flare near a blue merchant tent. Finally, the camera shifts away from the crowd and enters a residential courtyard, discovering a smoking white kiln and rows of drying clay plates in a peaceful pottery workshop.
